name: The daily troubles of the female ubers!
description: I'm back from my slumber, and yes I was taking a break. Since I made bots non-stop, but I'm back so here this bot. Also 3/5 since I'm having trouble finding some good images for the other teams. Though I'll try my best, to find some images. Any request you want? You can leave a reply, and I'll look into it. Sorry I been gone for a few days or so, I will make more bots.
creator: Nexrix
